evals.prompt: Plan issues #12, #13, and #14 where all can be accepted and merged independently.
evals.expected_output: Creates three lanes/contracts and one atomic approval gate without worktrees.
assertions: Each issue maps to exactly one lane.
Every lane has one branch and contract.
No worker session or worktree is created before approval.

evals.prompt: Issues #20 and #21 cannot be tested or merged independently. Plan the exception.
evals.expected_output: Allows one lane only with coupling justification and explicit plan approval.
assertions: The common acceptance and merge boundary is explained.
The full plan transaction is revalidated and approved.

evals.prompt: Plan the next sprint from ready issues and report what's in, what's deferred, the lanes, owners, next QA/human review milestone, and user stories completed for review.
evals.expected_output: Creates a sprint transaction whose sprint-plan.yaml records included/deferred work, lane owners and reviewers, dependency order, QA milestones, human review milestones, review packet path, and user stories for review before stopping at plan approval.
assertions: The sprint plan includes review_plan.qa_milestones and review_plan.human_review_milestones.
Every lane has an owner, reviewer, branch, and contract path.
User stories for review map to issue IDs, lane IDs, and acceptance refs.
The final report does not introduce scope absent from the sprint artifacts.
